mapper.select: /* SearchPopupMapper.getRelationWordListAjax /연관검색어10개,자동완성목록 */ SELECT CRRL_SEARCH_WORD, USE_YN FROM NMCP_SEARCH_CRRL_WORD_BAS WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND SEARCH_WORD LIKE '%' || #{srchText} || '%' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE, 'yyyymmddhh24miss') AND ROWNUM <= 10

/* SearchPopupMapper.getRecommendWordListAjax / 추천검색어 10개 */ SELECT SEARCH_WORD , SEARCH_WORD_RANK , A.RNK AS SEARCH_RNK FROM ( SELECT SEARCH_WORD , SEARCH_WORD_RANK , USE_YN , PSTNG_START_DATE , PSTNG_END_DATE , RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SEARCH_WORD_RANK, CRET_DT) RNK FROM NMCP_SEARCH_RECOMMEND_WORD_BAS ) A WHERE A.RNK <= 10 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') ORDER BY SEARCH_WORD_RANK

/* SearchPopupMapper.getPopularWordListAjax / 인기검색어 10개 */ SELECT SEARCH_WORD , SEARCH_WORD_RANK , SEARCH_REPEAT_CNT , SEARCH_RISE_NVAL FROM NMCP_SEARCH_PPLR_WORD_BAS WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 AND CRET_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE -1, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY SEARCH_WORD_RANK
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_SEARCH_TXN( CRET_DATE, USER_ID, SEARCH_WORD, SEARCH_RSLT_CASCNT, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID ) VALUES( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') , #{userId} , #{searchKeyword} , #{searchTotal} , #{cretIp} , SYSDATE , #{cretId} , #{amdIp} , SYSDATE , #{amdId} )
